stemHtml: An aircraft is being radar vectored downwind for the ILS to runway 27 of a regional airport. The ILS for runway 27 has been tuned in and displayed on the HSI. As the aircraft passes to the South-East of the airport, the Course Deviation Indicator (CDI) moves, changing from full-scale right indication, through the centre, to full-scale left. What is the most probable cause of this movement of the CDI?

options.a: Siting errors bending the ILS localiser beam.
options.b: Side lobes from the ILS localiser antenna.
options.c: Receiving the ILS of an intersecting runway.
options.d: Scalloping bending the ILS localiser beam.
